title: Mohawk Cat
content: The very first cat in the game, available to every player at the start,іt can also drop from a Normal Cat Capsule.True Form was added in version 2.0, doubling its attack power.

title: Eraser Cat
content: As the second Normal unit available, this defender joins your army once you beat the Korea in EoC 1. Purchasing it requires 0 XP, and it can also drop from a Normal Cat Capsule. Reaching its True Form in Update 2.0 grants significant boosts to both its HP and offensive stats.

title: Dark Cat
content: This melee unit is the third Normal cat you get, unlocking after beating China in EoC 1. It costs 0 XP to buy and can also be obtained from a Normal Cat Capsule. Getting its True Form in Version 1.0 increases its health and attack power.

title: Macho Legs Cat
content: This mid-range unit is the fourth Normal cat you get, unlocking after beating Germany in EoC 1. It costs 0 XP to buy and can also be obtained from a Normal Cat Capsule. Getting its True Form heavily increases its health and attack power while making it highly effective against Alien enemies. Was added in 2.0 version.

title: Lion Cat
content: This fast unit is the fifth Normal cat you unlock, becoming available after clearing Madagascar in EoC 1. It requires 0 XP to purchase and can drop from a Normal Cat Capsule. Activating its True Form greatly boosts its health and attack power while dramatically raising its movement speed to rush down lines. Was added in 2.0 version.

title: The Flying Cat
content: This area attack unit is the sixth Normal cat added to your team, unlocking after you beat Ethiopia in EoC 1. It costs 0 XP to buy and can also be obtained from a Normal Cat Capsule. Reaching its True Form upgrades its health and attack power, turning it into a powerful glass cannon capable of shredding groups of enemies. Was added in 2.0 version.
